endpoints.purpose: Liveness probe + SQLite reachability + watcher status.
Open the macOS Finder folder picker via osascript. Returns absolute path or null.
Return the currently watched folder, or null.
Start the watchdog observer on a folder (replaces any existing watch).
Stop the active watcher.
Analyze a single photo synchronously. Upserts into images. Used by the watcher and ad-hoc calls.
List analyzed images (filterable by source_folder). Annotates each row with personal_score from the in-memory model cache.
Return _progress dict for the current batch (running, total, done, eta, current_file, source_folder, stop_requested).
Return last 50 per-file errors with timestamps + step name (analysis/exif/database).
Return absolute path to data/app.log.
Set _progress[stop_requested]=True and _stop_event. Honored at next scorer boundary.
Return per-model loading state from phase2_quality.model_status (downloading/loading + size_mb + elapsed).
Evict cached PyTorch models from RAM; reload in background threads.
Personal model status: ready, training_size, min_decisions, trained_at, top_features.
Train GBR pipeline on all decided rows; persist data/models/personal_model.pkl; clear personal cache.
Compute SigLIP cosine clusters at given threshold (default 0.90). Returns groups + heroes.
Override hero selection for one similarity group (persisted in settings table).
DESTRUCTIVE: launch background batch over a folder. Pauses watcher. Skips already-analyzed (file_path, mtime). Sequential: only one batch can run.
Serve cached JPEG preview. Generates from RAW on first request.
256-bin per-channel + Rec.709 luminance histogram from the cached preview.
Transparent PNG overlay tinting clipped highlight (amber) or shadow (cyan) pixels.
Probe LM Studio at localhost:1234. Returns running + loaded_model.
Send preview + scores + EXIF to LM Studio for a 2-3 sentence narrative. Times out at 30s; failures persist nothing.
Clear stored narrative for one image.
List distinct source_folder values with image_count + last_imported_at. Used to reconstruct tabs at launch.
Drop image rows whose file_path is no longer on disk (scoped to source_folder).
DESTRUCTIVE: wipe analysis rows + previews for one source_folder. Decisions cascade-deleted.
DESTRUCTIVE: wipe ALL analysis rows + previews. NEVER touches model caches (~/.cache/pyiqa, ~/.cache/huggingface).
DESTRUCTIVE (filesystem): record K/M/R, move RAW + .xmp + .hif companions to dest folder, write XMP rating, invalidate personal cache.
Return all 9 numeric thresholds + 4 booleans with defaults resolved.
Update settings; if sharpness_weight changes, re-score overall_score for all images and clear personal cache.
Return per-source-folder K/M/X destination overrides (or null = use defaults).
Update per-source-folder K/M/X destinations. null clears the override.
Dry-run: compute predicted K/M/R for all undecided photos. Returns counts + scoring mode (personal/threshold).
DESTRUCTIVE: assign K/M/R to undecided photos and move files. Batch /decision.
DESTRUCTIVE: apply one decision to a list of image_ids.
DESTRUCTIVE: send all reject-decision files to macOS Trash via send2trash.
